prompt: Write in-app UX copy for 'Sebarkan' — a digital invitation builder app. I need: 1) Welcome screen after sign-up, 2) 3-step onboarding tutorial (choose template → customize details → share to guests), 3) Empty state for guest list page ('belum ada tamu'), 4) Success screen after sharing invitation, 5) Error message when payment for premium template fails. Target audience: Indonesian couples and families planning events. The tone should be warm, celebratory, and supportive.

assertions.description: Uses softening particles (nih, yuk, dong, ya) for warmth
Copy feels warm and celebratory, matching the wedding/event context
Includes empty state copy for guest list
Error message empathizes first, then directs — never blames user
Success screen celebrates the moment of sharing invitation
Copy feels naturally Indonesian, not stiffly translated from English
